query:
SELECT
            SUM(amount) amount,
            SUM(
                CASE
                    WHEN method = 'yunzhanghu_alipay' THEN 0
                    ELSE COALESCE(fee, 0)
                END
            ) fee
        FROM payouts
        WHERE user_id = $1 AND (status = 'success' OR status = 'in-transit')
